Package renderer.core.shader

Class Fragment

java.lang.Object
renderer.core.shader.Fragment
public class Fragment extends Object
The Fragment class represents an attributed 'pixel' as generated by a Rasterizer.

  • Constructor Details

    • Fragment

      public Fragment(int x, int y)
      Creates a Fragment at pixel coordinates (x, y).
      Parameters:
      x - the x pixel coordinate of the Fragment
      y - the y pixel coordinate of the Fragment

  • Method Details

    • getNumAttributes

      public int getNumAttributes()
      Creates a Fragment at pixel coordinates (x, y) with the given depth.
      Returns:
      the number of attributes of the Fragment

    • getAttribute

      public double getAttribute(int index)
      Gets a scalar attribute at index.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the attribute to get
      Returns:
      the value of the attribute at index

    • getAttribute

      public double[] getAttribute(int index, int dimension)
      Gets a vector attribute at the given starting location and with the given dimension.
      Parameters:
      index - the starting index of the attribute
      dimension - the dimension of the attribute
      Returns:
      the attribute as a double array

    • setAttribute

      public void setAttribute(int index, double value)
      Sets a scalar attribute at index.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the attribute to set
      value - the value to set the attribute to

      public static int colorToInt(double c)
      Converts a color value from a double in [0, 1] to an integer in [0, 255].

      c - the color value to convert in [0, 1]
      Returns:
      the value of the color in [0, 255]
